params.name: Ink Chrysanths
params.description:
On Oct 14, 1567 AD, Xu Wei gave the Ink Chrysanth to a friend while studying in Hangzhou.
Xu Wei, literary name Qingteng, or green vine, was one of the three great talents of the Ming Dynasty known for his great skills in calligraphy and painting. His self-created ink-splashed freehand flower and bird painting method integrating the strengths of many painting schools is innovative. His paintings are full of transitions and changes; in particular, the chrysanthemums that he painted are tall, u …
